scripts.dev: npx concurrently "php artisan serve --host=127.0.0.1 --port=8000" "cd resources/frontend && npm run dev" --names=backend,frontend --prefix-colors=green,blue
scripts.install:all: npm install && cd resources/frontend && npm install
scripts.setup: composer install && npm run install:all && cp .env.example .env && php artisan key:generate
